name: utility-pm-changelog-curator
description: Draft CHANGELOG entries from git log via the pm-changelog-curator sub-agent. Dispatches natively on Claude Code with the pm-skills plugin (invokes @agent-pm-changelog-curator); on non-Claude clients (Codex CLI, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Gemini CLI) reads agents/pm-changelog-curator.md and executes the system prompt inline. Applies CLAUDE.md hygiene rules (no internal-notes references, no em-dashes, no Claude attribution trailers, public paths only). Returns a layered draft (full CHANGELOG draft
author: product-on-purpose
summary_zh: 这是一个从 Git 记录自动生成结构化更新日志草稿的工具，兼容多种 AI 编程助手，帮你免去手动整理提交记录的麻烦，快速输出规范干净的版本说明。
